summary: Frontend-only regression + code-review-fix verification for دليل مطر (10-tool RTL Arabic app). Executed 46 UI/logic assertions via Playwright across all 10 pages plus theme toggle. All 46 assertions passed. Both targeted fixes verified: HijriPage calendar cells now use stable `d-${day}` / `blank-${idx}` keys (no duplicate-key warnings observed; today highlighted correctly; prev/next navigation returns to the original month), and DateConverter Hijri month <option> uses month name as key with all 12 months populated and selectable.
action_items: No functional action required. Observed one dev-only console hydration warning on /whatsapp about a <span> child inside <option> — this is injected by the Emergent dev tooling wrapper (x-excluded span around dynamic text expressions), NOT by the app source. Source JSX is valid: <option key={c.code} value={c.code}>{c.name} (+{c.code})</option>. Safe to ignore in dev; will not appear in production build. If desired, could work around by concatenating into a single string variable, but not required.
critical_code_review_comments: HijriPage.jsx line 122: key fix using `d-${cell.day}` and `blank-${idx}` is correct and stable — verified no duplicate-key warnings.
DateConverter.jsx line 161: switching option key from index to Hijri month name works — all 12 months rendered and selectable.
ThemeContext localStorage key `dalil-matar-theme` verified — persists across reload and toggles back correctly.
Finance annuity math verified exact: 100000@5%/5y => 1,887.12 monthly, 113,227.40 total (matches PMT formula).
Mortgage split verified: 800000 @10% down => 80,000 down / 720,000 loan.
BMI 170cm/70kg = 24.2 in `وزن طبيعي` band — matches CATEGORIES thresholds.
Tax 1000@15% add mode => 150 VAT / 1,150 total; extract mode toggles cleanly; presets 5/10/14/15 all update rate state.
WhatsApp cleanNumber correctly strips leading zero and prepends country code: 966 + 0552211729 => https://wa.me/966552211729.
AI directory: 25 sites, category filter narrows results (image cat => 5), search filter works (ChatGPT => 1), external links have target=_blank.
Percent: all 4 tabs render their own result panel with share buttons.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is pure frontend (React CRA + Tailwind + moment-hijri). No backend, no auth. Public URL comes from frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All 10 pages have data-testid attributes. Theme is persisted in localStorage key `dalil-matar-theme`. When testing the hijri dropdown or lists, do NOT flag the injected `x-excluded` <span> hydration warning — it's dev tooling only. Numeric assertions must accept Arabic-Indic digits (٠-٩) with U+066C thousands separator and U+066B decimal.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. Both code-review fixes (HijriPage cell key, DateConverter option key) work as intended.
